# Templates

---

**skuba** allows you to initialise a new project from a variety of templates.

[Barebones] templates can be used for proof-of-concepts, scripts, or anything outside of the ordinary, and the [package] template covers open source npm packages.

SEEK employees can access additional templates for backend services and workers by selecting `seek →` in `skuba init`, which fetches an up-to-date list from the internal [SEEK-Jobs/skuba-templates] repository.

You can also [bring your own] externally-hosted template.

[barebones]: ./barebones.md
[bring your own]: ./byo.md
[package]: ./package.md
[seek-jobs/skuba-templates]: https://github.com/SEEK-Jobs/skuba-templates
